title: Force Escape
description:
The original “protect with ring” game finally comes to Steam.Clear a path for your fleeing shuttle in this minimalist physics challenge. Smash, push, and sweep obstacles out of the way before they destroy your ship. The goal is simple: keep moving, stay alive, and escape the planet.

This game is friggin' hard. Still, all the levels are handcrafted and carefully tested. They can be beaten, even if at first glance it appears impossible.

In fact, the full game can be beaten in less than fifteen minutes. But only if you’re perfect.

Built for PCThe Steam version has been rebuilt and tuned specifically for PC, with responsive controls, clean widescreen presentation, and new features designed for those who appreciate a challenge.

Features• Minimalist physics-based gameplay

• 55 handcrafted levels

• Steam achievements

• Custom leaderboards

• 2x Speed Mode for expert players

• Built and tuned for PC

• No ads or in-app purchases of any kind

Let's not beat around the bush. Force Escape is a very difficult game. Beating one level might be easy. But all of them? It's... a challenge.

Still, the premise is simple:

Clear the path. Protect the ship. Escape the dying world.

From the maker of Mind Construct, Idle Drops, System Ascension: Idle Core and the LitRPG Judicator Jane series.
description_short: The original “protect with ring” game finally comes to Steam. Use your force ring to clear a path for your fleeing shuttle, survive 55 handcrafted levels, and escape the planet. It takes less than fifteen minutes to beat—but only if you’re perfect. Live, die, repeat.
